languages.text: "Вы принесли печальные вести, {mf|лорд|леди} Гапрак. Ваш дом всегда служил мне верой и правдой. Я дозволяю вам присоединиться к совету — как ценному союзнику династии".

traits.locale_text: [draft] Вот как, печальные вести, но послужите хоть ценным советом, если уж не силой.

languages.text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."
languages.original_text: "Вы принесли печальные вести, {mf|лорд|леди} Гапрак. Ваш дом всегда служил мне верой и правдой. Я дозволяю вам присоединиться к совету — как ценному союзнику династии".

traits.locale_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."
"You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."
"You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

languages.text: “你带来了不幸的消息，贾帕克{mf|大人|女士}。你的家族一直对我忠心耿耿。我准许你作为王朝尊贵的盟友加入议会。”
languages.original_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: “你带来了不幸的消息，贾帕克{mf|大人|女士}。你的家族一直对我忠心耿耿。我准许你作为王朝尊贵的盟友加入议会。”

languages.text: « Une bien triste nouvelle, {mf|seigneur|dame} Gaprak. Votre maison m'a toujours servi avec la plus grande loyauté. Je vous autorise à intégrer ce conseil, en tant qu'{mf|allié estimé|alliée estimée} de la dynastie. »
languages.original_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: « Une bien triste nouvelle, {mf|seigneur|dame} Gaprak. Votre maison m'a toujours servi avec la plus grande loyauté. Je vous autorise à intégrer ce conseil, en tant qu'{mf|allié estimé|alliée estimée} de la dynastie. »

languages.text: «Trae usted tristes noticias, {mf|lord|lady} Gaprak. Su casa siempre me ha servido con fidelidad. Tiene mi permiso para participar en el consejo... como valios{mf|o|a} aliad{mf|o|a} de la dinastía».
languages.original_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: «Trae usted tristes noticias, {mf|lord|lady} Gaprak. Su casa siempre me ha servido con fidelidad. Tiene mi permiso para participar en el consejo... como valios{mf|o|a} aliad{mf|o|a} de la dinastía».

languages.text: "Üzücü haberler getirdin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Gaprak. Hanen bana daima sadakatle hizmet etmiştir. Hanedanlığın değerli bir müttefiki olarak konseye katılmana izin veriyorum."
languages.original_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Üzücü haberler getirdin {mf|Lord|Leydi} Gaprak. Hanen bana daima sadakatle hizmet etmiştir. Hanedanlığın değerli bir müttefiki olarak konseye katılmana izin veriyorum."

languages.text: "Ihr überbringt traurige Nachrichten, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Euer Haus hat mir immer treu gedient Ich gestatte Euch, dem Rat beizuwohnen ... als {mf|geschätzter Verbündeter|geschätzte Verbündete} der Dynastie."
languages.original_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr überbringt traurige Nachrichten, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Euer Haus hat mir immer treu gedient Ich gestatte Euch, dem Rat beizuwohnen ... als {mf|geschätzter Verbündeter|geschätzte Verbündete} der Dynastie.

languages.text: 「悲しい知らせを運んで来たのですね、ギャプラク卿。貴家はいつも忠実に仕えてくれました。貴方を評議会に加えることを許します。王朝にとって貴重な同盟者として。」
languages.original_text: "You bring sad tidings, {mf|Lord|Lady} Gaprak. Your house has always served me faithfully. I give you leave to join the council — as a valued ally of the dynasty."

traits.locale_text: 「悲しい知らせを運んで来たのですね、ギャプラク卿。貴家はいつも忠実に仕えてくれました。貴方を評議会に加えることを許します。王朝にとって貴重な同盟者として。」
